讀書再考牌

Best websites to learn hacking

1. Hack This Site! (https://www.hackthissite.org/)
This will be always be my personal favorite, it contains awesome challenges from easy to very hard. If you want to start using your brains, try it, it’s worth it. All you need is to do an account there with just email needed. If you have found Hack This Site useful, you should really consider donating to it if you have any extra money.

2. Cybrary (https://www.cybrary.it/)
Haven’t tried this one personally, but it seems great and contains loads of tutorials. Offers you free “Hacking lab” experience, and certification courses.

3. SecurityTube (http://www.securitytube.net/)
The third site on my list. It contains awesome videos, and only videos, so the concept is different than the other two above. Just sit back and watch, remember to keep your brains functional and gathering information. If you are good at learning from videos, you should try this.

Source: https://pengs.win/best-websites-to-learn-hacking/
